summary: Verified admin login bug fix: /admin now renders AdminLogin form (data-testid=admin-login-page) instead of 'Admin access required'. Backend login with hakkiveda@gmail.com works (returns is_admin:true, must_change_password:true). After login, full Admin Dashboard sidebar renders, Profile tab auto-selected with password-change warning. Homepage and /shop regression OK.
passed: GET /admin (no JWT) renders admin-login-page testid; no redirect to /auth; no 'Admin access required' message
Admin login form submission -> admin-dashboard sidebar visible (Dashboard/Products/Orders/Customers/Coupons/Newsletter/Messages/Reviews/Blog/Homepage/Profile)
Profile tab auto-selected after first login, password-change warning shown ('Please change your default password in Profile')
Regression: homepage (/) loads with correct title 'Premium Ayurvedic Hair & Skin Care · HAKKIVEDA'
Regression: /shop loads with content, no errors
